
--- page 1 ---


Example Protocol Audit — Cantina Portfolio Engagement
Auditor: Cantina
Date: December 2024

Introduction

This is the report for a competition-style audit of Example Protocol,
conducted in collaboration with the development team.

--- page 2 ---


Files in scope

The following files were reviewed as part of this engagement:

- https://github.com/example-org/core/blob/abc123/contracts/Pool.sol
- https://github.com/example-org/core/blob/abc123/contracts/Vault.sol
- https://github.com/example-org/core/blob/abc123/contracts/Strategy.sol
- https://github.com/example-org/core/blob/abc123/contracts/Registry.sol

Reference only (not in scope):
- OpenZeppelin Ownable
- SafeERC20 from solmate

--- page 3 ---


Findings Summary

Cantina identified two low-severity issues in Pool and one informational
note on Vault. Strategy and Registry were clean.
